Safety and Technology Package ($945 value)Front Fog LampsRear Pedestrian AlertHD Surround VisionTraffic Sign RecognitionPreferred Equipment Group 2LTRear Camera MirrorRear Camera Mirror Washer  Safety and Security Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Rear camera - Watching your back!  The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe. Rear collision mitigation - It has your back.  Rear collision mitigation uses sensors to monitor the area behind you.  If it senses an impending crash, it activates certain features to help prevent a collision or reduce the severity of it. Put your worries behind you with rear collision mitigation.Technology and Telematics Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.   Get the Satisfaction that comes with an Spartanburg Certified Pre-Owned Program With a Certified Pre-Owned Vehicle (CPOV), you have far more than just a used vehicle. Every vehicle that passes is then subjected to a comprehensive 125-point inspection and a thorough reconditioning process. description: The 1997 Ford E-350 Cutaway configured as a box truck is a durable commercial vehicle designed for cargo hauling, delivery work, and general fleet operations. It is powered by a 5.4L Triton V8 engine, known for its long-term reliability and strong low-end torque. This engine is paired with a heavy-duty automatic transmission and rear-wheel drive, offering dependable performance for continuous commercial use. As a box truck, it features a large enclosed cargo area ideal for moving, equipment transport, and commercial deliveries. Many units come outfitted with shelves, racks, or tie-down points, increasing organization and storage capability. Dual rear wheels (DRW) provide added stability and higher payload capacity, making it well suited for heavy loads. The cab is simple and work-focused, typically equipped with vinyl seating, durable flooring, air conditioning, and basic controls. Visibility is aided by large side mirrors, and the overall chassis is built for easy service and heavy-duty operation. Safety features include ABS, commercial-grade braking components, and a strong frame structure. The low mileage (88K actual miles) on this particular example is notable for a vehicle of this age, suggesting potential for long remaining service life. Overall, the 1997 E-350 Cutaway box truck offers dependable V8 performance, strong payload capability, and practical cargo space, making it a reliable and versatile choice for commercial and industrial use. description: 1995 Chevrolet 1500  Why This Car Is Special  The 1995 Chevrolet 1500 stands as a testament to classic American trucks, delivering robust performance alongside a distinctly vintage aesthetic. Known for its reliable and strong engineering, this particular model bears significant uniqueness as indicated by its VIN prefix, 1GCEC14H, which attests to its heritage and built quality. Furthermore, with a sole previous owner and a clean Carfax, its maintenance history promises tranquility and satisfaction for any enthusiastic collector or aficionado seeking a vintage yet dependable daily driver.  Features List  - One owner vehicle ensuring well-maintained condition - Clean Carfax, providing peace of mind regarding its history - Stock vehicle, preserving the original specifications and performance - Green exterior color that offers a distinctive and appealing look - Grey cloth interior for a comfortable and classic styling - Equipped with a potent 5.0 V8 engine, ensuring powerful performance - Automatic transmission for ease of driving - Classic Chevy truck design, appealing to collectors and enthusiasts alike  Mechanical  At the heart of this Chevrolet 1500 is its 5.0-liter V8 engine, a powerhouse that delivers substantial torque and horsepower, perfect for both tough working conditions and leisure cruising. Coupled with an automatic transmission, it provides a smooth and effortless driving experience that is unmatched in vehicles of this era. The motor's durability is legendary, and its effectiveness in a variety of scenarios makes it the preferred choice for those who value reliability and strength.  Interior  Inside, the truck features a grey cloth interior that combines comfort with practicality. The seats and trim have been kept in excellent condition, reflecting the care taken by its previous owner. The layout is straightforward and user-friendly, ensuring all controls are within easy reach. This simplicity is a breath of fresh air compared to modern vehicles' often overly complex interiors.  Exterior  The exterior of this Chevrolet 1500 is painted in a striking green hue that not only stands out but also complements its classic body lines beautifully. The truck's well-preserved paint and clear coat shine brilliantly, highlighting its well-maintained condition. The design reflects the strong, rugged capabilities of the truck while also showcasing a style that is timeless and appealing.  Conclusion  This 1995 Chevrolet 1500 is more than just a truck; itâ€s a slice of automotive history, perfect for those who appreciate the blend of classic design and dependable performance. Featuring a striking Summit White exterior and a sleek Jet Black interior accented with bold red details, this vehicle stands out on the road. With 55,801 miles, it offers a balanced blend of value and dependability. Equipped with a 1.3-liter turbocharged engine and a 9-speed automatic transmission, this Trailblazer delivers an engaging driving experience with impressive fuel efficiencyâ€26 mpg city and 30 mpg highway. Loaded with features like Apple CarPlay, a backup camera, Bluetooth connectivity, heated seats, keyless entry, lane keep assist, push start, satellite radio readiness, a tow package, and WiFi hotspot, this used SUV offers comfort, convenience, and connectivity at every turn. This used 2023 Chevrolet Trailblazer RS is packed with advanced safety and security features designed to keep you protected. It includes a rear seat reminder to alert you to check the back seats, dual front knee airbags, and four-wheel anti-lock braking system (ABS) for enhanced stopping power. The vehicle also features power door locks with anti-lockout capability, auto-locking function for added security, and a programmable safety key for personalized access. An electronic parking brake with auto-off further enhances safety and ease of use, providing peace of mind whether you're parking or on the move. The sound system includes six speakers for immersive audio, complemented by auxiliary inputs for USB and iPod/iPhone devices, ensuring your favorite tunes are always within reach. 2023 Chevrolet Trailblazer Performance Features Performance-wise, this used Trailblazer boasts intelligent features tailored for efficiency and control. description: Experience the power and sophistication of the 2018 Dodge Charger, a stunning four-door sedan that combines exhilarating performance with modern technology. This used Charger features a robust 6.4-liter V8 engine producing 485 horsepower at 6100 rpm and 475 lb-ft of torque at 4100 rpm, delivering an adrenaline-pumping drive. Its RWD drivetrain ensures dynamic handling and a classic muscle car feel, making every journey memorable. Inside, the Charger offers seating for five in a stylish, well-maintained interior equipped with advanced features such as Apple CarPlay, Bluetooth connectivity, and SiriusXM satellite radio, all accessible through an intuitive 8.4-inch touch screen. The premium audio system ensures a rich sound experience, while keyless entry, push start, and backup camera add convenience and safety, making this vehicle a perfect blend of performance and modern tech.The 2018 Dodge Charger combines impressive safety and security features to provide peace of mind on the road. Brembo premium brakes deliver exceptional stopping power, complemented by rear parking sensors that assist in tight maneuvers. Dual active head restraints enhance occupant safety during sudden stops, while four-wheel ABS ensures stability under challenging conditions. The vehicle is prepared for emergency braking situations, and power door locks feature auto-locking for added security. Painted brake calipers and brake drying technology not only enhance the vehicles sporty appearance but also improve braking performance, making this Charger as safe as it is powerful.2018 Dodge Charger Safety and Security FeaturesThe safety suite of the Charger is designed to protect both driver and passengers at all times. Brembo premium brakes provide superior stopping power, while rear parking sensors help prevent collisions during low-speed maneuvers. Active head restraints in the front reduce injury risk in the event of a sudden stop or collision. The vehicles four-wheel ABS system ensures stability under emergency braking, and emergency braking preparation further enhances safety. Auto-locking power door locks add an extra layer of security when the vehicle is unattended. Painted brake calipers and brake drying technology not only contribute to the vehicles aesthetic appeal but also optimize braking performance, ensuring reliable stopping power when needed most.2018 Dodge Charger Entertainment and Technology FeaturesThe 2018 Dodge Charger is packed with advanced entertainment and connectivity features designed to keep drivers connected and entertained. SiriusXM Guardian compatibility allows smartphone app integration for remote start and vehicle tracking, while voice-operated radio and electronic messaging assistance simplify communication on the go. The HD radio provides crystal-clear audio quality, and the 8.4-inch touchscreen display serves as the central hub for all infotainment functions. Apple CarPlay and Bluetooth connectivity enhance smartphone integration, while the premium 276-watt audio system with six speakers delivers immersive sound. Auxiliary USB inputs make it easy to connect additional devices, ensuring everyone stays entertained during every drive.2018 Dodge Charger Performance FeaturesBuilt for high-performance driving, the 2018 Dodge Charger features a rear limited-slip differential that enhances traction during spirited drives. Cylinder deactivation technology helps improve fuel efficiency without sacrificing power, allowing the V8 engine to operate more efficiently when full performance isnt necessary. The sport-tuned suspension provides sharp handling and responsiveness, making the Charger agile around corners and comfortable on the highway. This combination of performance features ensures that the Charger delivers a thrilling driving experience while maintaining everyday usability and reliability.[!@@Additional Info@@!]Safety and description: 2019 Chevrolet Camaro Coupe 1SS 1LE 6-Speed This 2019 Chevrolet Camaro 1SS 1LE coupe has 19K miles. Equipped with a 6.2-liter LT1 V8, it was factory rated at 455 horsepower and 455 lb-ft of torque. Dual radiators are noted, along with coolers for the engine oil, transmission, and rear differential. Power is sent to the rear wheels through a six-speed manual transmission featuring active rev-matching and an electronic limited-slip differential. The car is equipped with a dual-mode performance exhaust system. The vehicle is finished in Shadow Gray Metallic (GJI) with a black hood and side mirrors, featuring a front splitter, a rear spoiler, HID headlights, and a hollow front bowtie emblem. Clear paint protection film covers the nose, and a ceramic coating has been applied. Dark gray 20 split five-spoke forged aluminum wheels are mounted with 285/30 front and 305/30 rear Michelin Pilot Super Sport tires, installed in May 2022. The car came equipped from the factory with a Magnetic Ride Control suspension, and stopping power is provided by ventilated Brembo front and performance rear discs. The interior features Recaro front bucket seats and a contoured rear bench, trimmed in Jet Black leather and suede microfiber with gray accents. The suede-wrapped flat-bottom steering wheel frames a 200-mph speedometer and a tachometer with a 6,500-rpm redline, as well as auxiliary gauges for voltage, oil pressure, coolant temperature, and fuel level. Amenities include a head-up display, a performance data and video recorder, power-adjustable front seats, keyless entry, dual-zone automatic climate control, cruise control, and a Chevrolet Infotainment 3 Plus system. Looking for a car with comfort, performance, and easy handling? Then this is the one for you. Give LRA a call at  or email us at "" to inquire about this vehicle.

description: Experience luxury and performance with this 2017 BMW X3 sDrive28i SUV. Powered by a 2.0L Turbo I4 engine paired with an 8-speed shiftable automatic transmission and rear-wheel drive, this X3 delivers an engaging driving experience and impressive efficiency. Enjoy premium features like the Premium Package 3, push-button start, power folding side mirrors, and a power-operated rear liftgate for added convenience. Stay comfortable with dual-zone automatic climate control, height-adjustable power front seats, and leatherette upholstery. Technology highlights include a 6.5-inch infotainment screen, Bluetooth connectivity, SiriusXM Satellite Radio, and BMW Assist. Safety is top-notch with features such as a tire pressure monitoring system, multiple airbags, stability and traction control, rain-sensing wipers, and front and rear crumple zones. The stylish exterior boasts aluminum alloy wheels, LED front fog lights, and aluminum roof rails. This X3 is ready for your next adventure-visit us today for a test drive!   Welcome to Price LeBlanc Lexus in Baton Rouge, LA. We're your premier Baton Rouge Lexus dealership specializing in new Lexus vehicles and certified pre-owned in addition to other brands pre-owned vehicles. Our inventory comes from Lexus lease returns, local trade-ins and our loaner fleet units. We use market based pricing on all preowned units (up to 500 miles comparison on some units) to provide you with a hassle free car buying experience. description: Chicago Motors Inc. is your number-one source for pre-owned police and government vehicles. description: Jones Ford on Rivers Avenue in North Charleston is proud to offer a wide selection of quality used vehicles backed by experience, transparency, and a commitment to doing business the right way. We hand-pick our inventory and put every vehicle through a detailed inspection process so customers from Charleston, Summerville, Mount Pleasant, Hanahan, Moncks Corner, West Ashley, James Island, Daniel Island, Ladson, Wando, Ravenel, and Johns Island can shop with complete confidence. From hardworking trucks and versatile SUVs to dependable daily drivers, our used vehicles are competitively priced and ready for the road, all supported by a knowledgeable team that believes buying a vehicle should be clear, honest, and pressure-freejust like it used to be.  This 2020 Nissan Rogue SV checks all the boxes for the discerning driver. With its sleek silver exterior and well-appointed interior, this Rogue is a true standout. Boasting a powerful yet efficient 2.5L I4 DOHC 16V engine paired with a smooth-shifting CVT with Xtronic and all-wheel drive, this Rogue delivers an impressive 25 city/32 highway MPG, making it an excellent choice for your daily commute or weekend adventures.  Stepping inside, you'll be greeted by a host of premium features that elevate the driving experience. Enjoy the convenience of a power driver's seat, dual-zone automatic climate control, and a premium audio system with SiriusXM radio and NissanConnect with navigation. Stay connected with Apple CarPlay and Android Auto, and keep your hands on the wheel with steering wheel-mounted audio controls.  Safety is a top priority, and this Rogue delivers with a comprehensive suite of advanced driver-assistance technologies. Blind Spot Warning, Rear Parking Sensors, and a Lane Departure Warning System help you navigate the road with confidence, while features like Automatic High Beam Headlights and Brake Assist provide an extra layer of protection.  Backed by a recent oil change and having passed our rigorous dealer inspection, this 2020 Nissan Rogue SV is ready to take you wherever the road leads. With its impressive combination of performance, technology, and safety, it's the perfect companion for your busy lifestyle.  If you're looking for a quality used vehicle backed by experience, transparency, and a team that believes in doing business the right way, we invite you to visit Jones Ford on Rivers Avenue in North Charleston. Family-owned and proudly serving the Lowcountry since 1967, we've built our reputation on straightforward pricing, knowledgeable staff, and treating our customers with respect. Visit us at 5757 Rivers Avenue, North Charleston, SC 29406, or call  to speak with a member of our team. Finished in Glacier White Metallic with a Black interior accented by red stitching , this RS Q8 delivers aggressive styling, premium craftsmanship, and exhilarating power in one refined package. Under the hood, the RS Q8 is powered by a 4.0L twin-turbocharged V8 engine paired with an 8-speed Tiptronic automatic transmission and Audis legendary quattro all-wheel drive system . This performance-focused drivetrain delivers exceptional acceleration, confident traction, and precise handling in all driving conditions. Adaptive air suspension , active roll stabilization , and all-wheel steering further enhance ride comfort and cornering performance, making this SUV as capable on winding roads as it is on the highway. The exterior design is elevated by multiple performance and appearance packages, including the Carbon Optic Package and Black Optic Package , which add carbon fiber elements, black exterior trim, black mirror housings, and distinctive RS styling details. Massive 23-inch Y-spoke design wheels finished in anthracite with summer tires give the RS Q8 an aggressive, athletic stance, while ceramic brakes provide outstanding stopping power and visual impact. Inside, the cabin reflects Audis commitment to luxury and performance. The Luxury Package and Extended Leather Package wrap the interior in premium materials, including leather-covered dash, armrests, and center console. Sport seats with massage functionality, heated and ventilated front seats , and heated rear seats ensure comfort for all passengers. The Alcantara headliner , carbon fiber inlays, and red contrast stitching add a motorsport-inspired feel throughout the cabin. Technology is front and center with Audi Virtual Cockpit , a dual touchscreen MMI infotainment system , integrated navigation, and Bang & Olufsen Advanced 3D Sound System for an immersive audio experience. Convenience features include power soft-closing doors , power tailgate , head-up display , power-adjustable steering column , and Audi advanced key with hands-free access. Safety and driver assistance systems are extensive, featuring Adaptive Cruise Assist , Audi side assist , lane departure warning , surround view cameras , front and rear parking sensors , and pre sense front and rear collision mitigation. The included Towing Package adds versatility for drivers who need both performance and capability. description: Jones Ford on Rivers Avenue in North Charleston is proud to offer a wide selection of quality used vehicles backed by experience, transparency, and a commitment to doing business the right way. We hand-pick our inventory and put every vehicle through a detailed inspection process so customers from Charleston, Summerville, Mount Pleasant, Hanahan, Moncks Corner, West Ashley, James Island, Daniel Island, Ladson, Wando, Ravenel, and Johns Island can shop with complete confidence. From hardworking trucks and versatile SUVs to dependable daily drivers, our used vehicles are competitively priced and ready for the road, all supported by a knowledgeable team that believes buying a vehicle should be clear, honest, and pressure-freejust like it used to be.  This 2021 Chevrolet Equinox LT is a standout in our pre-owned selection. With just 93,876 miles on the odometer, this well-maintained SUV is ready to take on your daily commute or weekend adventures. Boasting a sleek silver exterior and a spacious, well-appointed interior, the Equinox LT offers an exceptional blend of style, comfort, and capability.  - Passed Dealer Inspection - Recent Oil Change - CONFIDENCE & CONVENIENCE PACKAGE - 18" Aluminum Wheels  Under the hood, you'll find a powerful yet efficient 1.5L DOHC engine paired with a 6-speed automatic transmission, delivering an impressive 26 city/31 highway MPG. The Equinox LT also comes equipped with a host of advanced features, including:  - Dual-Zone Automatic Climate Control - Heated Front Seats - Power Driver's Seat - Rear Power Liftgate - Blind Spot Monitoring - Rear Cross-Traffic Alert - Rear Park Assist  Whether you're hauling cargo, navigating city streets, or taking a road trip, this Equinox LT has the versatility and capability to handle it all. The spacious interior offers ample room for passengers and their belongings, while the suite of advanced safety and convenience features ensures a confident and comfortable driving experience.  At Jones Ford, we understand that finding the right used vehicle is about more than just the sticker price. That's why we're committed to providing transparent pricing, a hassle-free buying process, and a team of knowledgeable professionals who are dedicated to your satisfaction. We invite you to visit our showroom and take this Equinox LT for a test drive. We're confident you'll be impressed by its quality, features, and the exceptional value it offers.  If you're looking for a quality used vehicle backed by experience, transparency, and a team that believes in doing business the right way, we invite you to visit Jones Ford on Rivers Avenue in North Charleston. Family-owned and proudly serving the Lowcountry since 1967, we've built our reputation on straightforward pricing, knowledgeable staff, and treating our customers with respect. Visit us at 5757 Rivers Avenue, North Charleston, SC 29406, or call  to speak with a member of our team. description: Vehicle Details: Turn heads in Savannah, GA with this powerful 2021 Dodge Challenger R/T Scat Pack  a true muscle-car standout with only 36,872 miles. Equipped with a thunderous 6.4L V8 gasoline engine and rear-wheel drive, this Dodge Challenger delivers exhilarating performance, crisp throttles, and that iconic V8 soundtrack every enthusiast craves. Built for spirited drives and confident highway cruising, the Scat Pack blends classic muscle attitude with modern convenience.  This Dodge Challenger is packed with driver-friendly tech: Remote Start for cool or warm cabin comfort before you step inside, Hands-Free Bluetooth and Android Auto to keep your phone connected and your focus on the road, a Back-Up Camera and Rear Parking Sensors to simplify parking and low-speed maneuvers. The result is a thrilling yet practical package perfect for weekend runs or daily commuting.  Meticulously maintained and priced to move, this 2021 Dodge Challenger R/T Scat Pack in Savannah represents the best price you'll find for this combination of low mileage, potent V8 performance, and desirable features. Whether you're hunting for raw power, classic styling, or modern connectivity, this Dodge Challenger checks every box. Don't miss the opportunity to own one of the most desirable muscle cars on the market  schedule a test drive in Savannah today and experience the Scat Pack's unmatched presence and performance firsthand.  Equipment: This model offers Android Auto for seamless smartphone integration. Bluetooth technology is built into this vehicle, keeping your hands on the steering wheel and your focus on the road. Apple CarPlay: Seamless smartphone integration for the Dodge Challenger - stay connected and entertained on the go!  with XM/Sirus Satellite Radio you are no longer restricted by poor quality local radio stations while driving this mid-size car.  Anywhere on the planet, you will have hundreds of digital stations to choose from. See what's behind you with the back up camera on this 2021 Dodge Challenger . The state of the art park assist system will guide you easily into any spot. Keep your hands warm all winter with a heated steering wheel in  this 2021 Dodge Challenger  . Never get into a cold vehicle again with the remote start feature on this vehicle. This Dodge Challenger keeps you comfortable with Auto Climate.
